signals.title: Army wants up to 100 drone boats to fill watercraft gap in Pacific
signals.summary: As the Army contends with a shortage of boats in the Pacific, it's looking at autonomous watercraft to fill the gaps.

signals.title: Why energy and utilities are moving from ‘systems’ mindset to a ‘connected platform ecosystems’ mindset powered by Vertical AI
signals.summary: How leading providers are connecting customer, workforce and grid operations into one Vertical AI ecosystem.

signals.title: Quantum computing is about to become a national security problem in orbit
signals.summary:
Quantum computing is advancing fast, and nations are racing to field the first machines powerful enough to break modern encryption. This race has direct consequences for the commercial space industry, […] 
 The post  Quantum computing is about to become a national security problem in orbit  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Israel sells Spyder air defense systems to Romania for $2.3 billion
signals.summary: According to manufacturer Rafael, it's the largest contract in its history.

signals.title: Comcast jumps 9% after announcing it will spin off NBCUniversal and Sky from cable business
signals.summary: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky.

signals.title: 'This bargain is eroding': Inside the youngest generations' view of the American Dream
signals.summary: Gen Z is at a tipping point, some economists say: the first U.S. generation in living memory where the majority may be unable to achieve the American Dream.

signals.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: Severe weather
signals.summary: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.

signals.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
signals.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

signals.title: Spain-backed fund joins FOSSA’s sovereign satellite communications push
signals.summary:
Spanish startup FOSSA Systems has raised about $10.5 million to expand its connectivity constellation in a funding round that included a technology investment vehicle backed by Spain’s government. 
 The post  Spain-backed fund joins FOSSA’s sovereign satellite communications push  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: SatVu restarts commercial operations with HotSat-2
signals.summary:
British thermal imaging startup SatVu announced the start of commercial services June 29 for HotSat-2, marking a return to revenue-generating operations after its debut satellite failed in low Earth orbit in 2023. 
 The post  SatVu restarts commercial operations with HotSat-2  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Craft Prospect selected for The Sunday Times Scotland Fast 50
signals.summary:
(Glasgow, UK) Glasgow-based space engineering company Craft Prospect has been selected for inclusion in the inaugural edition of The Sunday Times Scotland Fast 50, a new annual list recognising some […] 
 The post  Craft Prospect selected for The Sunday Times Scotland Fast 50  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: China establishes VLEO industry alliance as satellites demonstrate sustained low-orbit operations
signals.summary:
HELSINKI — China has established a national very low Earth orbit industry alliance, as multiple satellites demonstrate sustained operations below 300 kilometers and propulsion startups attract investment. China established a […] 
 The post  China establishes VLEO industry alliance as satellites demonstrate sustained low-orbit operations  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Oil prices near pre-war levels  —  but persistent supply risks could spark a rebound, analysts warn
signals.summary: Commodity strategists warn that Iranian leverage in the Strait of Hormuz will continue to weigh on oil markets and shipping costs.

signals.title: Oil prices rise as U.S. and Iran reach deal to halt attacks, U.S. oil above $70 per barrel again
signals.summary: Oil prices were higher after an agreement between the U.S. and Iran to halt recent hostilities in the Middle East.

signals.title: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
signals.summary: Honeywell Aerospace starts trading, and a few more M&A deals.

signals.title: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up
signals.summary: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.

signals.title: [13F] Pershing Square (Ackman) — nuovo filing 2024-07-29
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Scion Asset Mgmt (Burry) — nuovo filing 2023-08-10
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: Putin’s fuel shortage admission signals growing strain on Russia’s energy infrastructure
signals.summary: Putin's comments mark the first time he has detailed the extent to which Ukraine's deep-strike successes have hampered Russia's fuel production.

signals.title: Protein coffee? Brands cash in on functional beverage boom
signals.summary: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.

signals.title: China's economy picks up in June on rebounding U.S. exports, analysts say
signals.summary: China's economy is showing signs of picking up after a sluggish few months — thanks in part to a rebound in shipments to the U.S.

signals.title: China widens Japan export curbs, targeting drone makers, nuclear firms and defense institutes
signals.summary: China blacklisted four of Japan's government defense research institutes and placed dozens more Japanese firms under tightened export restrictions Monday.

signals.title: From concerts to train rides, bots are winning the ticket wars — but they're only part of the problem
signals.summary: From concerts to train reservations, automated bots have become the latest target in the fight against ticket scalping.

signals.title: NATO allies promised Trump they’d secure the Arctic; they’ve got work to do
signals.summary: Through most of NATO’s eight-decade history, the inhospitable High North was low priority. That calculus is now changing.

signals.title: The grid operates in seconds, but financial settlement still moves in months
signals.summary: Big Tech is allocating hundreds of billions of dollars for data center expansions; creating reporting frameworks for energy flexibility is the next step, writes Andrii Garanin at Silicon Foundation.

signals.title: Data centers are ready to negotiate flexibility for speed
signals.summary: Hyperscalers want their data centers online and utilities want to provide interconnections, but experts say both are still looking for common operating guidelines.

signals.title: ASHRAE to tackle data centers, thermal systems at annual conference
signals.summary: The engineering society’s annual meeting, starting this weekend in Austin, Texas, will have programs on managing energy costs and integrating energy storage projects, among others.

signals.title: Before there were Trump Accounts, SEED OK gave some newborns $1,000 — how researchers say the grants affected kids
signals.summary: Some state-sponsored programs paved the way for Trump Accounts, the new tax-deferred investing accounts for children.

signals.title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
signals.summary: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

signals.title: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
signals.summary: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.

signals.title: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
signals.summary: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.

signals.title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
signals.summary: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.

signals.title: ‘Heated Rivalry’ fuels a boom in gay romance stories, with women leading the fandom
signals.summary: ‘Heated Rivalry’ has helped gay romance stories gain mainstream attention, with women driving much of the fandom.

signals.title: Why investors may want to prioritize bond markets outside the U.S.
signals.summary: Allspring Global Investments is pushing clients toward countries with central banks that are raising interest rates or have different inflation dynamics.

signals.title: US strikes Iranian missile, drone, radar sites
signals.summary: The U.S. struck Iranian missile, drone and radar sites on Friday, U.S. Central Command said.

signals.title: 101st soldiers use drones to drop grappling hooks, breach razor wire
signals.summary: The Army should treat drones like ammo, one officer said, estimating a brigade needs between 1,000 to 1,500 drones per week in sustained combat operations.

signals.title: Romania bolsters Black Sea fleet with Turkish-built corvette
signals.summary: The transfer marks the first delivery of a Turkish-built warship to a European Union and NATO member state, underscoring Turkey’s growing naval exports.

signals.title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
signals.summary: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.

signals.title: Trading in these two ETFs suggests inflation fears are overblown
signals.summary: It could have been a big week for bond bears, if it weren't for crude oil.

signals.title: The memory shortage shaking Apple and Microsoft is 'existential crisis' for smaller players
signals.summary: While Apple and Microsoft raise prices on key devices to help cover the soaring costs of memory, smaller consumer electronics companies are in dire straits.
